body_txt: A character who talks big about his (or, more rarely, her) love life and success with the ladies (or gents), but in fact has little or nothing going on. Can be part of Of Course I'm Not a Virgin . If everybody else is talking about the protagonist's (nonexistent) conquests, it's an Urban Legend Love Life . Compare Have I Mentioned I Am Heterosexual Today? , which is frequently used in a parallel way . Subtrope of Suspiciously Specific Denial . Also see Do You Want to Copulate? and Unexpected Virgin . Contrast Fake Virgin for a sexually active person who claims they're a virgin.
